content_fingerprint: hugging face launches inference providers to streamline model deployment hugging face has updated its blog with a new guide covering inference providers a feature designed to let developers route inference requests across multiple hosted backends without managing infrastructure themselves hugging face has posted a new community guide on inference providers a feature that allows users to call models through a unified api while letting hugging face handle routing to supported inference backends the feature is surfaced as part of the platform s broader push to reduce the operational burden of run
